programme.title: Timothy Bradley vs Manny Pacquiao I
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Manny Pacquiao and Timothy Bradley started their trilogy at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a battle for the WBO World Welterweight title that ended in a split decision win for Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: Todd Foster vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On August 6th, 1992 Todd Foster fought Jeff Mayweather at Denton Field in Miles City with Mayweather going down in rounds 7 & 8 the bout resulted in a technical knockout victory for Foster.

programme.title: Tommy Morrison vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1993 Tommy Morrison battled George Foreman for the WBO world heavyweight title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas with Foreman getting a point deducted in round ten the bout resulted in a victory for Morrison.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Dillian Whyte
programme.desc: On April 23rd, 2022 Tyson Fury fought Dillian Whyte for the WBC World Heavyweight title at Wembley Stadium Whyte suffered injuries throughout the fight causing the fight to end by technical knockout in the 4th round giving the bout to Fury.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Otto Wallin
programme.desc: On September 14th, 2019, Tyson Fury fought Otto Wallin for the Lineal Heavyweight Championship at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. Despite sustaining a severe cut above his eye early on, Fury prevailed and emerged victorious with an unanimous decision.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz
programme.desc: On June 15th, 2019 Tyson Fury went up against Tom Schwarz for the WBO Intercontinental Heavyweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted two rounds ending by technical knockout securing Fury's win.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachencko vs Anthony Crolla
programme.desc: On April 12th, 2019 Vasiliy Lomachenko fought Anthony Crolla for the WBA and WBO World Lightweight title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles with Crolla down in round 3 and a count waived with California rules it finished as a knockout victory for Loma

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Jorge Linares
programme.desc: On May 12th, 2018, Vasiliy Lomachenko fought Jorge Linares for the WBA and Ring Magazine Lightweight Titles at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite being knocked down in round six, Loma was able to stop Linares in the 10th round.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Masayoshi Nakatani
programme.desc: On June 26th, 2021 Vasiliy Lomachenko fought Masayoshi Nakatani with Nakatani going down once in round 5 securing the win for Loma by technical knockout.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Richard Commey
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021 Vasiliy Lomachenko faced Richard Commey for the vacant WBO Inter-continental lightweight title at Madision Square Garden in New York with Commey going down in round 7 the bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for Loma.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Roman Martinez
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2016 Vasiliy Lomachenko battled Roman Martinez for the WBO World Super Featherweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with Martinez going down and counted out in round 5 out of 12 resulting in a knockout victory for Loma.

programme.title: Vince Phillips vs Kostya Tszyu
programme.desc: On May 31st, 1997, Vince Phillips fought Kostya Tszyu for the IBF Junior Welterweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth battle, Phillips pulled off a shocking and emotional upset over Tszyu with an impressive 10th round TKO win.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 1
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1994 Vinny Pazienza faced Roberto Duran for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout Pazienza went down in round 5 and Duran won this fight by unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 2
programme.desc: On January 14th, 1995 Vinny Pazienza fought Roberto Duran for a second time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for Pazienza.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The clash of the two Egyptian God Monsters releases mystical energies that show Yugi and Kaiba visions of the ancient Egyptian past! What new answers do these images unlock, and what prophecies do they make for the future?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons three powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragons, but Yugi has no monsters remaining in his deck! Is losing only a matter of time, or will a long-dormant card from a fallen friend help turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba not only controls Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, but his Final Attack Orders card leaves Yugi with only three cards in his deck! If Yugi loses, he'll have to give up his chance to save the world from Marik's evil!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Tired of Kaiba's insults, Joey challenges Kaiba for third place in the Battle City Tournament! Has Joey mastered enough strategies to take down the top dog, or is Kaiba going to wallop Joey like a pathetic puppy?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba attacks with his mighty Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but Joey has no monsters to defend with! Joey's luck has run out, so it's time for him to rely on skill!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey and Kaiba's battle reaches its roaring climax! Will Joey take down his biggest headache and actually teach Kaiba a thing or two about being a true duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the critical Battle City showdown with the fate of the world at stake: Yami Yugi vs. Marik! If Yami Yugi loses, Yugi is taking a permanent vacation into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Marik proves his The Winged Dragon of Ra is the strongest Egyptian God Card by destroying Slifer the Sky Dragon! None of Yugi's cards can withstand its assault, but a gift from Kaiba may turn the duel around…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi can't strike Marik's life points, and with every turn that passes, Marik is one step closer to taking down Yugi with a final strike from The Winged Dragon of Ra...

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Yugi at the end of his ropes and the maniacal Marik waging all-out war, can Marik's oldest friend reach Marik in time to help him come to his senses before his insanity overwhelms him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Will the combined force of all of Yugi's monsters be enough to defeat an Egyptian God that terminated two other powerful Egyptian Gods? The fate of the world hangs in the balance with the finale of the Battle City Tournament!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: KaibaCorp Island is set to explode in mere minutes, but the blimp's engines are offline! Can Yugi and friends escape from the island in time, or will they sink to the bottom of the sea?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Téa and Serenity tour around the Town of Domino and reminisce about their friends' battles during Battle City, they learn how much they've grown and far they've come... and how far they have left to go!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian God Cards are stolen! A terrifying new villain emerges! Real monsters begin to appear around the world! Can Yugi and the gang discover how these strange events are connected before the planet is destroyed?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With Seal of Orichalcos, not only can Gurimo have ten monsters at once, but each creature receives a power boost from Orichalcos's malevolent energies! Yugi better find a way to protect himself against Gurimo's horde!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only is our world on the brink of apocalypse, but an entire domain of monsters is also on the verge of collapse! Both Earth and the monster domain must unite and fight against the largest terror they have ever faced!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang set off on a cross-country trek when they're asked for help from a one-eyed former foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba returns to Duelist Kingdom for a showdown against Pegasus! Will Kaiba discover the secret behind Pegasus's strategies before he loses his soul, just like he did on his first trip to Duelist Kingdom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Not only does Alister's fiend gain attack points for every fiery monster on the field, but it can also take control of Kaiba's monsters! Will Alister get his revenge, or will Kaiba get aid from the monster domain?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai's back to help Yugi take down Dartz and save the world from annihilation... or is a topsy-turvy twist in the works?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has joined the enemy! Is she brainwashed, or is there some deeper reason for her unexpected transformation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Taking advantage of the Seal of Orichalcos, Mai coordinates her Harpie Ladies to whittle Joey's forces into waste! Is this the last we'll see of him, or will a legendary guardian recognize Joey as a true duelist?

programme.title: Victorious: Star-Spangled Tori
programme.desc: When Tori gets invited to sing the national anthem at a televised basketball game, she worries she'll forget the lyrics, but ends up in a much more embarrassing encounter with the team's mascot.

programme.title: Victorious: One Thousand Berry Balls
programme.desc: Andre gets Tori a job at a frozen yogurt stand, but work may keep them from performing at the Hollywood Arts Cowboy Luau. Robbie wants to ask Cat to the luau, but asks someone else, making Cat jealous.

programme.title: Victorious: The Slap Fight
programme.desc: Tori and the gang compete to see who can get the most followers on The Slap. But when they get caught up in the competition, they neglect their schoolwork and their friendships.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Goes Platinum
programme.desc: Tori wins a contest to sing the opening number at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.title: Victorious: Pilot
programme.desc: After Tori fills in for her ailing sister in a big musical showcase, Tori is asked to enroll at an elite performing arts high school. But once there, Tori struggles to fit in to her new surroundings.

programme.title: Victorious: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After Jimmy Fallon mentions iCarly on his late night show, the gang does a tribute webcast to him. Jimmy sees it and invites them to New York to appear on his show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPilot: When Miss Briggs rejects all their favorite contestants from talent show tryouts, Carly and Sam decide to host their talented classmates on their own online web show, iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iLike Jake: Carly has a crush on a boy at school named Jake. He's really cool and hot. Since Carly likes him, she invites Jake to sing and play guitar on her web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWant More Viewers: Carly and Sam compete against Freddie and Spencer to see who can come up with the best plan to get more kids to watch the iCarly webcast.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie want their web show to be reviewed by "Nevelocity," a really popular website that reviews other websites and webcasts.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWanna Stay With Spencer: Carly and Spencer's granddad makes a surprise visit. He's very concerned that Spencer is too irresponsible and wacky to be Carly's guardian. It's up to Carly and her friends to prove to her granddad that Spencer is capable.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSpy a Mean Teacher: Carly decides to do a webcast showing what mean teachers do when they're not in school. They decide to follow their mean teacher but find themselves in serious trouble when they accidentally get trapped at her apartment.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWant a World Record: Carly, Sam, and Freddie try to break the world record for the longest continuous webcast. To do so, iCarly will have to run for over 24 hours straight.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWill Date Freddie: An iCarly fan, Valerie, asks Freddie on a date. The date goes so well that Freddie begins filming Valerie's own web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHeart Art: Carly invites Spencer's art hero, Harry Joyner, to take a look at Spencer's work. When Harry calls Spencer's work amateurish, Spencer feels like his life has lost its purpose.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iAm Your Biggest Fan: iCarly's biggest fan, Mandy, is invited onto the show as a one-girl studio audience. Mandy turns out to be more of a stalker than a fan and the kids have to get rid of her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly asks their fans to send in videos of themselves doing their coolest dances. When over three thousand dance clips come in, Carly, Sam, and Freddie find themselves trying to stay up all night to watch the videos.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie do iCarly from an apartment that is rumored to be haunted. When creepy things start happening, the friends worry that the ghost rumors just might be true.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer saves the life of the lead singer of The Plain White T's and gets him to agree to go on iCarly. Strange things start going wrong in the middle of Carly, Sam, and Freddie's webcast

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam gets detention on the night of iCarly's 50th web show spectacular. Unable to do their normal webcast, Carly and Freddie do their best to get detention too so they can do the show from inside detention with Sam.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie are invited to Daka headquarters where they are offered a large sum of money to endorse Daka's new shoe, the Tech-Foot, on iCarly. But the shoes turn out to be terrible.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets a B on a History paper she should have gotten an A on. Sam, seeing an opportunity during her weekly meeting with Principal Franklin, changes Carly's grade in the computer and surprises her with the straight A's.
